Stalker

Dangerousaggressive
Depth
0 - 150m
Health
150
Drops
2
Biomes
1

Description

The Stalker is an aggressive, shark-like predator found primarily in Kelp Forests. Known for its distinctive elongated snout.

Behavior

Patrols kelp forests and attacks nearby prey. Can be distracted by metal salvage.

Found In

Kelp Forest

Drops

Stalker ToothRaw Stalker Meat
